brief: Bebodywise is currently tracking 6 competitors and 203 active ads, with video share at 31.25% and UGC at 13.89%. The competitive set is led by Kapiva on longevity (59.5%) and Innovist on experimentation (10.8%). The largest observed messaging movement is Subscription with a -13.19-point change versus baseline. Current whitespace opportunities include Discount push (13.19%), New creative velocity (7.64%), Transformation (8.68%). Recommended focus for the next 7 days: lift creative velocity, expand tests in underused themes, and apply strict kill/scale controls to improve efficiency and learning depth.

report.title: Adalyse Weekly Competitive Brief - Bebodywise

opportunities.name: Discount push
opportunities.insight: Kapiva leans heavily on Discount push (20.8% of its creatives) while the category uses it only 13.2%.
opportunities.action: Reverse-engineer Kapiva's top Discount push ad and launch 2 differentiated variants within 7 days.

opportunities.name: New creative velocity
opportunities.insight: Category experimentation is low at 7.6% new-ad velocity, which can slow learning cycles.
opportunities.action: Raise weekly new-ad introductions by 25% to improve signal discovery and reduce saturation dependence.

opportunities.name: Transformation
opportunities.insight: Transformation appears in only 8.7% of competitor ads, leaving low-clutter messaging space.
opportunities.action: Launch 2 new creatives anchored on Transformation and track CTR/CVR lift against current control.

priority_actions: Increase net-new creative velocity by 20-30% this week, with at least 2 assets in the lowest-competition gap theme.
Clone and adapt the winning pattern from Kapiva into 2 fresh hooks to extend ad life without fatigue.
Allocate at least 40% of this week’s output to video-style executions (current benchmark: 31.25%).
Set an explicit kill/scale framework: pause creatives below benchmark after 3 days; scale top quartile performers by 25-40% budget.
watchlist: Any message-theme movement above 8 points versus the 4-week baseline.
Longevity ratio shifts above 10 points for top competitors.
Experimentation-rate jumps above 12% indicating aggressive testing cycles.
